summary: Iteration 3 testing complete. Verified new features: branch-cashbank report, supplier-balance report with period filter, generic export endpoint, branch selection in Supplier Payments/Expenses/Pay Credit. All 52 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified with charts and export buttons working on all pages.

issues: Console warning: HTML hydration error about <tr> inside <span> - React DevTools artifact, not functional issue

Backend: /api/reports/supplier-balance returns all-time supplier balance data

Backend: /api/reports/supplier-balance?period=month works correctly
Backend: /api/reports/supplier-balance?period=year works correctly
Backend: /api/export/data type=sales format=excel/pdf works

Backend: /api/export/data rejects invalid type with 400
Backend: Supplier payment with branch_id stored correctly
Backend: Expense with branch_id stored correctly

Frontend: Supplier Payments page has export buttons (PDF + Excel)

critical_code_review_comments: Branch selection added to SupplierPayment, Expense, and SupplierCreditPayment models
Export endpoint properly handles all data types with both PDF and Excel formats
Recharts integration working well for Reports, Supplier Report, and Category Report pages
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs verified working (52/52 tests pass). New features tested: 1) /api/reports/branch-cashbank returns branch-wise cash/bank breakdown, 2) /api/reports/supplier-balance supports period=today/month/year, 3) /api/export/data supports type=sales/expenses/supplier-payments/customers/suppliers with format=pdf/excel, 4) branch_id field works in supplier payments and expenses, 5) Frontend has charts on Reports, Supplier Report, Category Report pages using recharts library, 6) ExportButtons component added to all data pages, 7) Pay Credit dialog has branch selection. Console shows hydration warnings from React DevTools - not functional issues.
